description: Fix sub-$1 coin prices showing as $0 and add a clickable history of the last 5 monitored coins

userStories.title: Show full price including decimals
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the full price of a coin so that sub-$1 coins like DOGE display their actual value instead of $0.
acceptanceCriteria: Price display shows the raw amount from the Coinbase API prefixed with $ (e.g. '$0.15432', '$68432.10')
Tab title shows the same full price (e.g. 'DOGE $0.15432')
The .split('.')[0] calls on lines 12 and 14 of bitcoinprice.js are removed
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Store coin history in localStorage
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to persist the last 5 monitored coins so they survive page reloads.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'coinHistory' array is stored in localStorage as JSON
When a coin is successfully switched to, it is added to the front of the history array
Duplicate entries are removed so the most recent position wins
The array is capped at 5 entries maximum
The currently active coin is excluded from the history array
On page load, the history is read from localStorage and parsed

userStories.title: Display coin history as clickable tags below the price
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my recently monitored coins below the price so I can switch back with one click.
acceptanceCriteria: A new div with id 'coin-history' is added below #btc-price-display in index.html
Recent coins render as small clickable tags/badges inside #coin-history
Tags are always visible (not hidden behind a menu)
The currently active coin does not appear in the tag list
Tags are styled subtly (small font, muted color, rounded) so they don't dominate the UI
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Click a history tag to switch coins
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click a recent coin tag to immediately switch to monitoring that coin.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a history tag switches the monitored coin to that coin's code
The price polling restarts for the new coin via startPolling()
The coin history updates: clicked coin moves out of history, previous coin appears in history
localStorage is updated with both the new selectedCoin and updated coinHistory
The history tags re-render to reflect the updated state
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
